channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SDP presidential candidate Adebayo outlines reform agenda and calls for democratic renewal in Nigeria
item.description: The presidential candidate of the Social Democratic Party (SDP), Adewole Adebayo, has formally unveiled his party’s vision for Nigeria, calling for what he described as a national rebirth ahead of the...

item.title: Overview of SheMeansBusiness May 2026 Edition
item.description: This edition of SheMeansBusiness, May 2026, showcases content focused on business updates and entrepreneurial insights. The e-edition provides readers with access to BusinessDay’s latest reports, indu...

item.title: Video game composers discuss AI concerns, indie innovation and the growing popularity of game soundtracks
item.description: The article explores the current state and future direction of video game music in 2026 through interviews with several prominent composers, including Austin Wintory, Lena Raine, Jesper Kyd, Gordy Haa...

item.title: Trinamool Congress faces internal disputes, resignations and public backlash in West Bengal after electoral setback
item.description: Three weeks after its electoral defeat in West Bengal, the Trinamool Congress (TMC) is witnessing multiple internal and external challenges, including infighting among senior leaders, resignations, co...

item.title: High Court Grants Temporary Protection to CHADEMA Against Registrar Actions
item.description: In Manyara, Tanzania, the High Court granted an interim injunction to CHADEMA, stopping the Registrar of Political Parties from taking any action against the party until the full case is heard. Justic...

item.title: Ishaq Dar holds Washington visit for talks with Marco Rubio amid regional tensions and Iran ceasefire discussions
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar reached Washington after completing a three-day visit to New York linked to United Nations engagements. According to Pakistan’s Foreign Office, Dar...

item.title: Helen Mirren expresses support for Tom Hardy amid MobLand production disputes
item.description: Dame Helen Mirren has publicly shown her support for Tom Hardy following reports that the actor had been removed from the British crime drama MobLand. Initial news suggested that Hardy, 48, had clashe...

item.title: Swellendam Police Station Commander Suspended Pending Investigation into Alleged Taxi Business Links
item.description: In a recent development that has raised concerns about police integrity in the Western Cape, the commander of the Swellendam Police Station has been suspended internally this month due to alleged ties...

item.title: Collapse of local industries leaves Musoma youth with limited livelihood options
item.description: In Musoma, the capital of Tanzania’s Mara region, many young people are facing a difficult economic reality as once-thriving industries continue to shut down. The article highlights how the collapse o...

item.title: MIT Develops Low-Energy Process for Efficient Lithium Extraction from Hard Rock
item.description: Researchers at MIT, working alongside collaborators, have introduced a new method for extracting lithium from hard rock deposits that could significantly reduce both cost and environmental impact. Tra...

item.title: Financial advisors open up about personal money experiences and industry insights in podcast series
item.description: This article explores the evolving podcast series Behind the Advice, created and hosted by Brenda Bouw, which highlights the human side of financial advisors in Canada. Since its launch in late 2023, ...

item.title: DILG mulls reward system as authorities intensify search for Senator Bato dela Rosa amid ICC warrant
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) is reportedly considering offering a reward for information that could lead to the arrest of Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, following an ac...

item.title: Six fatalities confirmed after six days of rescue operations in Angeles City building collapse
item.description: Authorities have confirmed that six people have died following the collapse of a nine-storey building in Angeles City, Pampanga, as search, rescue, retrieval, and clearing operations entered their six...

item.title: Dodgers prospect Kendall George injured after avoiding bat dog during Double-A game
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers prospect Kendall George may have suffered a potentially serious knee injury during a Double-A game while attempting to avoid contact with a bat dog on the field. The incident occur...

item.title: Sandiganbayan orders arrest and travel ban against Senator Jinggoy Estrada over alleged graft in flood control projects
item.description: The Sandiganbayan Second Division has issued an arrest warrant and a hold departure order (HDO) against Senator Jinggoy Estrada in connection with a graft case involving alleged kickbacks from governm...

item.title: Sikh man convicted of murdering university student after knife attack and false racism claim during police response
item.description: A jury at Southampton Crown Court has found 23-year-old Vickrum Digwa guilty of murdering 18-year-old university student Henry Nowak, who was fatally stabbed during an incident in Southampton. The cou...

item.title: Riverside County Beekeeper Faces Widespread Losses After Verona Fire
item.description: A devastating wildfire in Riverside County, California, destroyed millions of bees owned by local beekeeper Brandon Teller. The Verona fire, which erupted on May 19 in the Juniper Springs area, caused...

item.title: California student Shrey Parikh wins 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee after record spell-off round
item.description: Shrey Parikh, a 14-year-old Indian-origin student from California, won the 2026 edition of the Scripps National Spelling Bee held in the United States. He secured the title after correctly spelling th...

item.title: Calgary begins redevelopment of Olympic Plaza as part of downtown revitalization plan
item.description: Construction has officially begun on the transformation of Calgary’s Olympic Plaza, marking a major milestone in the city’s ongoing downtown revitalization efforts. The project, led by the Calgary Mun...

item.title: Criticism mounts over Labor’s rushed tax overhaul amid lack of consultation
item.description: The article examines the controversy surrounding the Albanese government’s rapid push to implement significant tax reforms, arguing that the process has been driven more by political considerations th...
